## HexalithEventStoreExtensions Class

Provides extension methods for adding the Hexalith EventStore topology
to an Aspire distributed application\.

```csharp
public static class HexalithEventStoreExtensions
```

## HexalithEventStoreExtensions\.AddHexalithEventStore\(this IDistributedApplicationBuilder, IResourceBuilder\<ProjectResource\>, string\) Method

Adds the Hexalith EventStore topology to the distributed application builder\.
This provisions DAPR state store \(in\-memory with actor support\), DAPR pub/sub,
and wires the CommandApi service with a DAPR sidecar\.

```csharp
public static Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources AddHexalithEventStore(this Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder builder, Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder<Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource> commandApi, string? daprConfigPath=null);
```

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.AddHexalithEventStore(thisAspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,string).daprConfigPath'></a>

`daprConfigPath` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

Path to the Dapr sidecar configuration file \(access control policies, D4/FR34\)\.
When null, the sidecar starts without access control \-\- all service\-to\-service
calls are allowed\. This is a security risk in production environments\.
